notes: HAR-310 captures Admin GraphQL gift-card schema shape; readable configuration; unknown-id and filtered empty read behavior; non-empty giftCards/giftCardsCount behavior; and successful giftCardCreate, giftCardUpdate, and giftCardDeactivate payloads with a conformance credential that has read_gift_cards/write_gift_cards. giftCard.transactions reads and giftCardCredit/giftCardDebit remain captured as access blockers until the conformance grant includes read_gift_card_transactions/write_gift_card_transactions. Runtime parity is enforced by integration tests for the locally modeled gift-card read/lifecycle slice. Notification roots are intentionally not executed in live capture because they are customer-visible side effects; local runtime handling short-circuits them without sending notifications.
